description_short: Protect your mattress with our comfortable and removable zipper cover, making it easy to clean and maintain freshness.

construction_layers.name: Zipper Cover
construction_layers.notes: Removable and machine washable Ezie Zipper Cover.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash in cold water, tumble dry on low.

proprietary_tech.name: CoolTEC™
proprietary_tech.description: Provides cooling sensation on contact, enhancing sleep comfort.

faq_specs.question: Is the cover removable?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, the zipper cover is removable and machine washable.

faq_specs.question: What sizes are available?
faq_specs.answer: Available in Single, Double, Queen, and King sizes.

notes_observed: Replacement zipper cover for the mattress itself (not a protector/topper). Sized to fit 6"-8" mattresses depending on SKU.
